name: UBA : Internal User Failed Mailbox Login Followed by Success
notes: Detects several mailbox login failures before a successful login from an internal user.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Multiple Mailbox Login Failed in a Short Period of Time
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when all of these BB:UBA : Multiple Mailbox Login Failed in a Short Period of Time, BB:UBA : Mailbox Login Success, in order, from the same username to the same destination IP, over 1 hours
when the event matches ExternalAccess (custom) is any of false
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Internal User Failed Mailbox Login Followed by Success on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when all of these BB:UBA : Multiple Mailbox Login Failed in a Short Period of Time, BB:UBA : Mailbox Login Success, in order, from the same username  to  the same destination IP, over 1 hours
AND when the event matches ExternalAccess (custom) is any of false
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Internal User Failed Mailbox Login Followed by Success
